list.name: Changes
list.comment: Updated the run method of the Hangman class by implementing it as the main controller of the game. Imported the GameStatistics class as it is used for verifying if the player has won and for display of stats. Changed how the intro display looks like. Changed parameter of readYesNo.

task.summary: Default task
Initial commit.
Added hangman resources to the resources directory.
Added packages for each responsibility and a main class for program run.
Created HangmanGame Interface that does the functions of playing a game like presenting intro, reading guess, or playing another game.
Created ClasspathResources class that is used to read the ASCII art and words from the text files.
Created Hangman class that implements HangmanGame interface. Added the methods with the own implementation still blank.
Created HangmanRenderer interface that disyaplays the current structure of the hangman. Changed acces modifiers fo dat fields and some methods in the Hangaman class.
Created AsciiArtRenderer class that implements the HangmanRenderer interface. It prints the correct ASCII picture to the console for a number of guesses.
Created WordRepository interface that gets random word from the wor text file. Imported this onto the Hangman class as it uses this interface.

Created FileWordRepository class that implements the WordRepository interface. This class overall gets a random word from the text file. Resolved import problems regarding packages on ClasspathResources.
Created ClasspathWordRepository class that implements word repository.
Created GameStatistics enum that store and counts the total number of played games in a single run. Also changed the version to use the record for GameStatistics.
Finished GameStatistics enum.
Added intro display in the intro method.
Made the constant variables final and static, initialized with a value, especially those that are used for the testing phase.
Created and implemented toString() method. Using a for loop, goes through each secret word and checks if character is the same as guessed letter. Puts the appended characters to the variable hint.
Created and implemented createHint() method. Using a for loop, goes through each secret word and checks if character is the same as guessed letter. Puts the appended characters to the variable hint.

Previous commit changes were deleted for readGuess() method, but it is already implemented before it. Created and implemented playOneGame method. Using a while loop to repeat process of guessing and to checks if guess word is already correct.

Implemented the displayHangman method from the manual that displays the hangman ascii in correspondence to the guess count remaining. Implemented also a throw exception to the HangmanRender interface as it deals with reading with text files.
Changes made in correspondence to the manual for the HangmanRenderer interface.
Revised AsciiArtRenderer by making the constants final and static with values, and implementing the render method with a validity checker and a for loop to display each lines.
Added displayHangman call to the playOneGame method.
Updated WordRepository to include IOException.
Updated it in connection to the manual.
Added comments to the getRandomWord method and data fields declared.

Updated Hangman class by revising the DEFAULT_WORDS variables array list as a fall back for the game, imported objects utilities into the class, implemented the getRandWord method to get words randomly from the word text file or the DEFAULT_WORDS, and updated the comments of the whole class.
Updated FileWordRepository and changed the constructor and imported ultilities in it.
Updated FileWordRepository by implementing the getRandomWord method.

Updated the run method of the Hangman class by implementing it as the main controller of the game. Imported the GameStatistics class as it is used for verifying if the player has won and for display of stats. Changed how the intro display looks like. Changed parameter of readYesNo.

MESSAGE.value: Created ClasspathResources class that is used to read the ASCII art and words from the text files.
Created Hangman class that implements HangmanGame interface. Added the methods with the own implementation still blank.
Created HangmanRenderer interface that disyaplays the current structure of the hangman. Changed acces modifiers fo dat fields and some methods in the Hangaman class.
Created AsciiArtRenderer class that implements the HangmanRenderer interface. It prints the correct ASCII picture to the console for a number of guesses.
Created WordRepository interface that gets random word from the wor text file. Imported this onto the Hangman class as it uses this interface.

Created FileWordRepository class that implements the WordRepository interface. This class overall gets a random word from the text file. Resolved import problems regarding packages on ClasspathResources.
Created ClasspathWordRepository class that implements word repository.
Created GameStatistics enum that store and counts the total number of played games in a single run. Also changed the version to use the record for GameStatistics.
Finished GameStatistics enum.
Added intro display in the intro method.
Made the constant variables final and static, initialized with a value, especially those that are used for the testing phase.
Created and implemented toString() method. Using a for loop, goes through each secret word and checks if character is the same as guessed letter. Puts the appended characters to the variable hint.
Created and implemented createHint() method. Using a for loop, goes through each secret word and checks if character is the same as guessed letter. Puts the appended characters to the variable hint.

Previous commit changes were deleted for readGuess() method, but it is already implemented before it. Created and implemented playOneGame method. Using a while loop to repeat process of guessing and to checks if guess word is already correct.

Implemented the displayHangman method from the manual that displays the hangman ascii in correspondence to the guess count remaining. Implemented also a throw exception to the HangmanRender interface as it deals with reading with text files.
Changes made in correspondence to the manual for the HangmanRenderer interface.
Revised AsciiArtRenderer by making the constants final and static with values, and implementing the render method with a validity checker and a for loop to display each lines.
Added displayHangman call to the playOneGame method.
Updated WordRepository to include IOException.
Updated it in connection to the manual.
Added comments to the getRandomWord method and data fields declared.

Updated Hangman class by revising the DEFAULT_WORDS variables array list as a fall back for the game, imported objects utilities into the class, implemented the getRandWord method to get words randomly from the word text file or the DEFAULT_WORDS, and updated the comments of the whole class.
Updated FileWordRepository and changed the constructor and imported ultilities in it.
Updated FileWordRepository by implementing the getRandomWord method.

Updated the run method of the Hangman class by implementing it as the main controller of the game. Imported the GameStatistics class as it is used for verifying if the player has won and for display of stats. Changed how the intro display looks like. Changed parameter of readYesNo.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Updated the run method of the Hangman class by implementing it as the main controller of the game. Imported the GameStatistics class as it is used for verifying if the player has won and for display of stats. Changed how the intro display looks like. Changed parameter of readYesNo.
